workflows.title: Monitor XSOAR cases
workflows.description: List and triage the open cases that need investigation.

workflows.title: Investigate an XSOAR case
workflows.description: Pull a case, read its war room, and search related indicators.

workflows.title: Search indicators
workflows.description: Look up the indicators attached to an XSOAR case.

workflows.title: Document a finding
workflows.description: Add an investigation note to a case and update its fields.

workflows.title: Close a case
workflows.description: Close a resolved case with a short closing summary.
